massage.heroSeoHeading: Therapeutic, sports and relaxation massage in Bratislava — V2studio, Križna 22
massage.destinationsDesc: Each journey is unique. Choose yours.
massage.aboutIntro: Welcome to V Studio Massage — your sanctuary of relaxation in the heart of Bratislava. We combine traditional massage techniques with modern therapeutic approaches.
massage.aboutJourney: Our team of certified therapists brings years of experience in sports, therapeutic, and relaxation massage. Every session is tailored to your individual needs.
massage.aboutExpertise: We specialize in deep tissue, Swedish, Thai, and hot stone massage techniques. Each therapist is trained and certified in multiple modalities.
massage.aboutMedical: With a focus on therapeutic outcomes, our sessions address chronic pain, stress relief, and rehabilitation with clinical precision.
massage.aboutContinuous: Our team regularly participates in advanced training programs and international wellness conferences to bring you the latest techniques.
massage.philosophyQuote: Massage is not a luxury — it is a path to balance, health, and inner harmony.
massage.achievement1: Certified by the International Spa Association
massage.achievement2: Trained in Thai, Swedish, and deep tissue modalities
massage.achievement3: Featured in Bratislava's Top Wellness Guide
massage.achievement4: Partnerships with sports teams and rehabilitation centers

process.expectation: Most clients feel immediate relief and deep relaxation. For chronic issues, a course of 4-6 sessions is recommended. We provide personalized aftercare advice to maintain results between visits.

review1.text: The best massage I've ever had. Anna found every knot and worked through it with incredible skill. I left feeling like a new person.
review1.author: David R.

review2.text: The hot stone massage was pure heaven. The room, the music, the technique — everything was perfect. Already booked my next session.
review2.author: Jana M.

review3.text: I've been dealing with chronic back pain for years. After 4 sessions here, the improvement is remarkable. Truly professional.
review3.author: Martin K.

review4.text: My partner and I did the couples retreat for our anniversary. It was an unforgettable experience. Highly recommend!
review4.author: Sofia & Tomas

review5.text: The Thai massage was authentic and amazing. I could feel the difference from other places immediately. Expert hands.
review5.author: Peter L.

review6.text: Online booking was easy, the studio is beautiful, and the massage exceeded expectations. Five stars without hesitation.
review6.author: Monika S.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before your first visit.

duration.a: Sessions range from 30 to 90 minutes depending on the technique. We recommend 60 minutes for a full-body treatment and 90 minutes for deep tissue or therapeutic work.

prepare.a: Arrive 10 minutes early. Avoid heavy meals 2 hours before. Wear comfortable clothing — for Thai massage, loose-fitting clothes are provided. Shower before the session if possible.

pressure.q: Can I choose the pressure level?
pressure.a: Absolutely. Your therapist will check in during the session and adjust pressure to your preference. Communication is key to the best experience.

frequency.q: How often should I get a massage?
frequency.a: For maintenance, once or twice a month is ideal. For chronic pain or recovery, we may recommend weekly sessions initially, then gradually spacing them out.

medical.q: Is massage safe if I have medical conditions?
medical.a: We always do a brief health consultation before your first session. Certain conditions may require a doctor's clearance. Please inform us of any conditions when booking.

aftercare.q: What should I do after a massage?
aftercare.a: Drink plenty of water, avoid intense exercise for 24 hours, and take a warm (not hot) bath if desired. Some mild soreness is normal after deep tissue work.

booking.q: How do I book and can I cancel?
booking.a: Book online through this website. You'll receive instant confirmation by email. Cancellations or changes should be made at least 24 hours in advance.

couples.q: How does the couples massage work?
couples.a: You and your partner are in the same room on adjacent tables, each with your own therapist. You can choose different techniques if preferred.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Questions? Prefer to talk? We're here for you.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your needs or ask any question...
contact.success: Thank you! We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

massage.reserveDesc: We look forward to welcoming you. Book your session now and discover the healing power of professional massage.

footer.tagline: Premium massage studio in Bratislava. Expert therapists, organic products, total relaxation.

depilation.heroLine2: Smoothness you'll want to come back for.
depilation.heroSubtitle: Premium depilation with 14 years of expertise. Medical precision meets comfort.
depilation.heroSeoHeading: Professional waxing and depilation for face and body in Bratislava — V2studio / Epilroom, Križna 22
depilation.viewPricesAndBook: View full price list and book your appointment.
depilation.aboutIntro: My name is Natalie Volik — I'm a premium-class depilation specialist with 14 years of experience and a medical education. I'm delighted to welcome you to <brand>V2Studio</brand>.
depilation.aboutJourney: My path began in Kyiv, where I worked as a specialist at a renowned depilation salon, before opening my own studio. Today I continue my work in Bratislava with the same professionalism and attention to each of you.
depilation.aboutExpertise: I master a wide range of depilation techniques and choose the method individually — based on skin type, hair structure, and sensitivity.
depilation.aboutMedical: I continually improve my skills through training, forums, and professional events. Throughout my career I've upheld high standards of quality, safety, and service. That allows me to use modern techniques, the finest materials, and offer clients a truly premium result.
depilation.aboutContinuous: I work with both women and men, offering discretion and professionalism in every detail.
depilation.achievement1: Winner of the Ukraine Depilation Championship, «Professional» category
depilation.achievement2: Technologist-educator for brands Terra, Enova, Biolaif
depilation.achievement4: Speaker at professional conferences and marathons
depilation.achievement5: Participant in international beauty industry trade shows

sugaringFullArms.desc: Complete arm treatment from wrist to shoulder.

sugaringFullLegs.desc: Silky legs from ankle to hip. Lasts 3–4 weeks.

sugaringClassicBikini.name: Sugaring — Classic Bikini
sugaringClassicBikini.desc: Bikini line — gentle and precise. Minimal irritation.

sugaringDeepBikini.name: Sugaring — Deep Bikini
sugaringDeepBikini.desc: Complete intimate zone. Maximum comfort, absolute privacy.

waxClassicBikini.name: Wax — Classic Bikini
waxClassicBikini.desc: Fast bikini line treatment with warm wax.

waxDeepBikini.name: Wax — Deep Bikini
waxDeepBikini.desc: Full intimate depilation. Discreet, professional, painless.

laser.title: Laser epilation
laser.body: We work with a diode laser. The treatment suits all areas—from face to deep bikini.
bullets: After the first session you’ll usually notice softer hair and slower regrowth.
Safe when protocol is followed and after a consultation.
For maximum results, a course of about 10–15 sessions is usually recommended.

wax.title: Wax epilation
wax.body: A fast, effective way to remove hair from the root.
bullets: Skin stays smooth for up to 3–4 weeks.
Suits all areas: legs, arms, bikini, underarms, and face.
With each visit hair tends to grow finer; results are visible right after the session.

sugar.title: Sugaring
sugar.body: Gentle sugar-paste removal from the root. Hair is taken in the direction of growth—less irritation and fewer ingrowns.
bullets: Suits all areas, including sensitive skin.
Smooth skin for up to 3–4 weeks.
Over time hair can become finer and sparser.

electro.title: Electroepilation
electro.body: A lasting solution for unwanted hair: each hair is treated individually, the follicle is disabled, and regrowth is prevented. Ideal for face, bikini, underarms, and small hard-to-reach spots where other methods fall short.
bullets: Most people need about 6–12 sessions for complete removal of the treated hair.

piercing.title: Piercing
piercing.body: We pierce the whole ear—lobe and cartilage. Needle or gun; a wide choice of jewellery.
bullets: Adults and children from four months—with parental consent and our safety rules.
Jewellery and aftercare are chosen together with you.

cosmetology.title: Cosmetology
cosmetology.body: Holistic care with attention to every client’s skin.
bullets: Facial massage—for tone, lift, and glow.
Cleansing treatments—for deep cleansing and freshness.
Peels—for renewal and smoother, more even skin.
Therapeutic and maintenance treatments tailored to your skin.
Most importantly—we build a home-care plan so results last and improve every day.

courses.title: Training courses
courses.body: Professional waxing and sugaring courses. Groups of up to two or one-to-one sessions.
bullets: Beginner training from scratch.
Advanced skills and upskilling.
Practice on tricky areas where you need more confidence.
Preparation for depilation championships.
courses.scheduleText: Contact us by phone, WhatsApp, or email for the next intake—we will agree format, level, and schedule.
courses.topicsText: Salon hygiene, skin and hair assessment, waxing and sugaring technique, sensitive zones, client consultation, and competition-focused practice where needed.

additional.title: Additional
additional.body:
Intimate whitening is a discreet aesthetic treatment for women: professional brightening products gently even out tone, address melanin, and leave the area looking neat and cared for.

Anti-cellulite wraps are an intensive option without aggressive devices—for clients who want visible change. We use the Austrian professional line STYX Naturcosmetic.
bullets: Whitening: gentle professional formulas; women only.
Wraps: many clients notice less puffiness after the first session.
Strong lymphatic support and help flushing excess fluid.
Smoother-looking cellulite texture; firmer, more elastic skin.
Detox effect; STYX Naturcosmetic.

process.title: How Your Visit Works

consultation.title: Consultation
consultation.desc: We discuss your goals, skin type, and together we choose the ideal technique.

preparation.title: Preparation
preparation.desc: We gently cleanse and prepare the skin. Sterile single-use instruments are opened in front of you.

procedure.title: Procedure
procedure.desc: The technique is performed with precision and care, following protocols and each client's individual needs.

aftercare.title: Aftercare
aftercare.desc: You receive personalized recommendations for the best and longest-lasting results.

process.expectation: Most clients describe the sensation from their first visit as brief, tolerable warmth. First sessions may be more sensitive — each visit gets easier. How long results last depends on the procedure type: typically 3–5 weeks, or permanently with electroepilation.

team.title: Your specialists
team.subtitle: Certified studio professionals perform every treatment.

workspace.title: Our Studio
workspace.desc: A calm, private space designed for your comfort. Every detail — from lighting to temperature — is carefully considered to make your experience as relaxing as possible.

hygiene.title: Safety & Hygiene
hygiene.subtitle: Your health is non-negotiable. Every detail is controlled.

singleUse.title: Single-Use Tools
singleUse.desc: All applicators, spatulas, and contact materials are opened from sealed packaging in front of you and disposed of immediately after use.

sanitization.title: Medical-Grade Sanitization
sanitization.desc: Surfaces and equipment are disinfected with professional antiseptics after each client.

sterilization.title: Autoclave Sterilization
sterilization.desc: All reusable instruments undergo autoclave sterilization at 180–200°C.

certified.title: Certified Materials
certified.desc: We work exclusively with certified professional brands: Terra, Enova, Biolaif. All products are dermatologically tested and hypoallergenic.

review1.text: I had laser epilation with master Natasha and I'm very happy. The session was as comfortable as possible and almost painless. I'd been to another specialist before — it hurt much more, so I can compare. Natasha is very careful and attentive. I'll definitely come again! Thank you.
review1.author: Alena Kotova

review2.text: I had my cartilage pierced and I'm thrilled ❤️ A very attentive, calm, and careful specialist. She explained everything in detail beforehand, answered all my questions, and helped me choose jewellery. The process was quick and almost painless; sterility was top level. I especially want to mention her light hand and caring approach 🙌 Healing is going great, with no issues, thanks to clear aftercare advice. If you've been thinking about a cartilage piercing but feel nervous — book with confidence. You're in safe hands! 🥰
review2.author: Kristina Sanduliak

review3.text: Huge thanks to Natali for professionalism and tact! 🌸 From the first minutes you feel at ease; the atmosphere is welcoming, everything is gentle and calm. My waxing flew by unnoticed: Natali is a true pro — confident and caring. My skin felt perfect, no discomfort, just lightness and a great mood! Rare to meet such an attentive specialist. This is my place now — 100% recommend! ❤️
review3.author: Artem

review4.text: I had my cartilage pierced with Natali Volik — everything was neat and calm. She's very attentive, explained everything in detail and answered my questions. It was quick and almost painless, everything clean and professional. I'm delighted with the result.
review4.author: Viktoriia Lomeiko

review5.text: Huge thanks to Natasha. A wonderful specialist — delicate and attentive to detail. I got not only the treatment but also care advice, and I had a lovely time at the salon. I recommend her to everyone.
review5.author: Svitlana Sapehina

review6.text: I highly recommend master Natali! My bikini is always perfect thanks to her — neat, clean, and above all quick! Friendly atmosphere and great chats; I genuinely look forward to every beauty appointment ❤️‍🔥
review6.author: Alena Fitsoni

review7.text: I chose Epilroom_Bratislava three years ago and I only go there. Great place, professional masters, quality products, and always a cosy atmosphere 💛 solid five stars.
review7.author: Mariia Kononova

review8.text: You're simply amazing! The whole treatment was so quick and comfortable I didn't notice the time. Your skilled hands and light conversation made it as painless as possible. My skin is perfectly smooth and soft now! The result exceeded my expectations — I'm so glad I can forget the razor for weeks. A true professional — I recommend you to everyone and I'll definitely be back!
review8.author: Lol Juj

review9.text: I'm very happy with Natalia! She does depilation professionally, quickly, and to a high standard — and she's polite, tactful, and lovely.
review9.author: Yelena Volosozhar

review10.text: Natali is simply a MEGA master and person 💯 In Ukraine I went to the same master for over 5 years; finding "your" master abroad is hard, but I was incredibly lucky to find Natali here — from the first visit I knew she was my MEGA master. Thank you for quality, humanity, and the cosy vibe 😘
review10.author: Of fridom

review11.text: Such a pleasant salon atmosphere — you're always greeted with a smile, your mood lifts, and the work is 100%! I love how sterile everything is, how clearly they explain and show everything, and the sweet treats 😉 10/10 🙏
review11.author: Alena Barantseva

review12.text: I had cartilage piercing with master Natalia — loved it. She's very communicative, helped choose the best spot, and I'll definitely come again ✨💗
review12.author: Valeriia Khmilenko

review13.text: I've been for depilation several times and I always love it — great quality and a nice atmosphere. I'll keep coming back ❤️
review13.author: Alena Postolnik

review14.text: With Natalia everything is always professional — she really listens and works quickly. Lovely atmosphere too!
review14.author: Lida Privezentseva

review15.text: The best laser epilation specialist in the world. After the first visit about 40% of hair was gone. Most importantly — Natalia's incredible energy. For us women, feeling comfortable during these treatments matters so much… With Natalia it's like an old friend — so comfortable. Fast, painless. We even had a good laugh. I only go to her now.
review15.author: Tetiana Kosarieva (Kosarieva.cosmetolog)

review16.text: Hello. Natalia, thank you for your work — I loved how you do it: quality, clean, painless, and comfortable. You're a master of your craft. Thank you ☺️
review16.author: Viktoria Ganzienko

review17.text: The master is great! We chatted through the whole session.
review17.author: Ann

review18.text: Beautiful work! Very happy with the result — recommend!
review18.author: July Bel

review19.text: I'd like to leave a great review for master Natalia. I came to her for piercing — you can choose needle or gun. On the spot she suggests jewellery options and advises what works best. She stays in touch, checks how you're doing, and answers questions. She provides aftercare product and instructions. I had no issues with my piercings.
review19.author: Yeva Yachmenova

review21.text: Everything was wonderful — pleasant atmosphere, cleanliness, and comfort. The team is lovely and attentive; I felt relaxed. I also loved the little touches: sometimes cute gifts like gingerbread, fun collaborations, and a choice of products such as deodorants from trusted pros. Only positive impressions — I'll definitely return. Highly recommend!
review21.author: Polina

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before your first visit.

painful.a: Most clients describe it as a brief, tolerable warmth. I use techniques that minimize discomfort, and the sensation decreases with each subsequent session as hair becomes finer. If you're sensitive, I'll adapt the approach specifically for you.

prepare.q: How should I prepare for my appointment?
prepare.a: Hair should be 3–5 mm long (about 10–14 days of growth). Avoid sunbathing, tanning beds, and exfoliating 24 hours before. No creams or lotions on the day of the procedure. That's it — I'll take care of the rest.

results.a: Depending on the technique and body zone, results last 3–5 weeks. With regular sessions, hair grows thinner and slower over time. Laser epilation provides long-term reduction after a course of sessions.

technique.q: Which technique is best for me?
technique.a: It depends on your skin type, hair structure, and sensitivity. During the first visit, I'll assess your needs and recommend the most effective method. I'm certified in all five techniques — sugaring, wax, bio, laser, and electroepilation.

men.a: Absolutely. I work with both women and men, ensuring full tact, confidentiality, and professionalism. All services are available regardless of gender.

pregnancy.q: Can I have depilation while pregnant?

aftercare.a: Avoid hot baths, saunas, direct sun, and tight clothing for 24–48 hours. I'll give you a personalized aftercare card after every session with specific recommendations for your skin type.

booking.q: How do I book and can I cancel?
booking.a: Book online through this website — select a service, date, and time. You'll receive an instant email confirmation. Need to reschedule? Just contact me at least 24 hours in advance.

sensitive.q: Is it safe for sensitive skin or allergies?
sensitive.a: Yes. My medical education allows me to work safely with all skin types, including sensitive and allergy-prone skin. All materials are dermatologically tested and hypoallergenic. I always do a patch test if there's any concern.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Questions? Prefer to talk? I'm here for you.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell me about your needs or ask any question...
contact.success: Thank you! I'll get back to you within 24 hours.

depilation.serviceBioDesc: Premium natural formulas. Maximum care for your skin with professional brands.

admin.helpSectionIntroTitle: Signing in and choosing a business
admin.helpSectionIntroBody:
Sign in from Admin with your work email (or Google, if enabled). Massage and Depilation are two public entry points to the same studio — each has its own calendar, services, and price list for that context.

Use the language switcher in the header to change the interface (SK, EN, RU, UK).
admin.helpSectionNavBody:
Calendar — week/month schedule, drag appointments, and the “waiting for date” list.
Agenda — upcoming appointments in time order.
Analytics — search by name or phone; export PDF.
Price catalog — structure, prices, multilingual text; bookable lines sync to booking.
Settings — working hours, closed days, preparation time between appointments.

“Public booking” opens the customer site in a new tab.
admin.helpSectionCalendarBody:
Drag a timed booking to another day or slot. You cannot move into the past.

Small badges on the Calendar tab: red counts bookings that still need a real date and time; amber counts full-day bookings that still need every required calendar day chosen.

Customers who booked “we’ll arrange the date with you” appear in the unscheduled list until you assign slots.

Use “Add appointment” to create a booking manually. Choose date + time, or “Day only” for full working days (multi-day services get one date row per day).
admin.helpSectionEditBody:
Open a block or row, then Edit. Update name, phone, email, internal notes, and schedule where the form allows.

For TBD (no slot yet) records, set date/time or each required full day in the modal, or use the calendar list actions your workspace provides.

Past appointments are view-only.
admin.helpSectionPriceBody:
Organise services, sections, zones, and price lines. Set how each line is booked: time slot vs “arrange with client”, and how many full days when needed.

Save the catalog so bookable lines appear in public booking and get colours in the admin calendar (by section or zone).
admin.helpSectionSettingsBody:
Turn individual days on or off for the month you see, then save. Closed days are hidden from public booking; existing appointments stay.

Preparation buffer: minutes automatically kept free after each appointment so clients do not overlap.
admin.helpSectionPublicBody: Use “Public booking” in the header to preview exactly what customers see. Test a flow after you change the price catalog or working hours.
admin.helpSectionTipsBody:
Treat the price catalog as the main place to define what can be booked for both Massage and Depilation.

Use Agenda when you need a quick “who is next” list on the phone.

If something is missing on the public site, check that the line is bookable, saved, and the day is open in Settings.
admin.appointmentsSubtitle: Drag an appointment to reschedule. Week view lets you move it to another day or time. Past slots are unavailable. Use Add appointment to create a new one.
admin.calendarBadgeTimeTitle: Bookings waiting for a date and time
admin.calendarBadgeDayTitle: Full-day bookings still missing chosen days
admin.fullDayNeedDaysCalendarHint: Not on the week grid until each required day is set in Edit (one date per row). Tap a row to open it.
admin.prepBufferInfoTitle: {minutes} minutes are reserved after each appointment for preparation. This time cannot be booked. Configure in Settings.
admin.prepBufferNote: {minutes} minute prep time is automatically kept between appointments so clients never overlap.
admin.settingsSubtitle: Manage working hours and services for {place}.
admin.manageServicesNote: Manage services customers can book. Each service has a title, color, and duration.
admin.manageWorkingHoursNote: Set when customers can book. Closed days won't appear in the public calendar.
admin.adminAllDayDayCountHint: Choose how many days this booking spans. Then pick each date below (they can be non-consecutive).
admin.appointmentTypeDayHint: Blocks the full working day. Use one calendar per required day below — all must be filled, each date only once.
admin.appointmentTypeDayLockedHint: All-day booking: time is not used. Set each required calendar day in its own row below.
admin.moveDayHint: Choose a new day and the whole day booking will shift with the same pattern.
admin.selectedDaysPerSlotHint: You must choose exactly {count} different days — one per row.
admin.fullDayPickExactlyDays: Choose exactly {count} calendar days (one date in each row).
admin.fullDayDaysMustBeDistinct: Each day must be a different date.
admin.allDayServiceLockedHint: The booked service line cannot be changed here. You can still update the calendar days below.
admin.dayMoveBlocked: The booking cannot be moved because one of its days is already occupied.
admin.itemBookingModeTime: Time slot — pick date and time
admin.itemBookingModeTbd: Arrange with client — no calendar on their side; message on the booking step; you assign dates later. Duration is not used; the public booking flow shows the day count instead of minutes.
admin.itemTbdDayCountHint: Shown on the price list and booking UI as day count (not duration). After the customer books, set each calendar day in Edit.
admin.itemScheduleTbdCustomerTitle: Message for the customer (booking step), per language
admin.deleteServiceNote: Remove {name}? Existing appointments will keep the service name but it won't appear in new bookings.
admin.pastAppointmentNote: This appointment is in the past. View only — no changes allowed.
admin.cannotCreatePast: Cannot create appointment in the past.
admin.appointmentAddedNotified: Appointment added. Customer notified by email.
admin.appointmentAddedNoEmail: Appointment added. Email could not be sent.
admin.slotBooked: This time slot is already booked.
admin.adminTimeNoSlots: No free slots on this day for the selected duration. Change duration or pick another date.
admin.adminAvailabilityLoading: Loading busy times for this month…
admin.fullDayClosed: One of the selected days is closed in working hours.
admin.saveFailed: Failed to save. Please try again.
admin.cannotMovePast: Cannot move appointment to the past.
admin.movedNotified: Appointment moved. Customer notified by email.
admin.tbdAssignedNotified: Date assigned. Customer notified by email.
admin.unscheduledTbdHint: These are not on the time grid and cannot be dragged. Use Edit on a row to set date and time.
admin.appointmentTbdNotice: This booking has no fixed slot yet. Set date and time below, or move it from the “Awaiting date” list on the calendar.
admin.cancelledNotified: Appointment cancelled. Customer notified by email.
admin.calCancelBody: Cancel the appointment for {customerName} ({serviceName})? The client will receive an email notification.
admin.prepBufferTitle: Minutes reserved after each appointment for preparation. This time cannot be booked.
admin.scheduleHoursOnlyHint: Configure which weekdays are open and their hours (from–to). To block entire days for customers, add an appointment in the calendar and choose «Day» — those dates become fully busy for booking.
admin.scheduleAllDayHint: Customers can book across the full day on this weekday. Timed services use 15-minute steps from midnight to midnight in the picker.
admin.scheduleSlotBeginsHint: Only start times are stored; the same list is reused every week for this weekday. Set when the day ends so long services cannot start too late.
admin.scheduleSlotBeginsNeedOne: Keep at least one begin time.
admin.dayToggleInfo: Click any day to switch it on or off. Gold = open, gray = closed.
admin.dayToggleTip: Changes apply to this month only. Remember to save.
admin.closeDayWithAppointmentsConfirm: This day has {count, plural, one {# appointment} other {# appointments}}. Closing will hide it from public booking, but existing appointments will remain. Continue?
admin.priceCatalogSubtitle: Manage services, sections, zones and prices for the Price page. Titles in 4 languages (SK, EN, RU, UK).
admin.selectNodeToEdit: Select a node from the left to edit.
admin.priceCatalogCalendarSyncHint: When you save, bookable lines become booking services and appear in the admin calendar. Each new section (or top-level zone) gets its own color automatically.
admin.priceCatalogPriceEmptyHint: Leave price empty to show "—" on the public list; that line has no booking link. TBD / full-day lines still link when price is a dash.
admin.priceCatalogMissingLine: This line is no longer in the catalog. Choose another item in the structure.
admin.priceCatalogDescriptionInputPlaceholder: Important info for customers (e.g. availability, pricing notes)
admin.sectionColorInCalendar: This color is used in the admin calendar for every item in this section.
admin.rootZoneColorInCalendar: This color is used in the admin calendar for items in this zone.
admin.zoneUsesSectionCalendarColor: Calendar color comes from the parent section.
admin.directItemsColorInCalendar: This color is used in the admin calendar for these line items.
admin.servicesManagedInPriceCatalog: Define bookable services in the Price catalog: add services, sections, zones and price lines, then Save. Calendar colors follow each section (or each top-level zone). You no longer maintain a separate service list here.

adminSignin.title: Admin sign in
adminSignin.subtitle: Sign in with email and password to access the admin panel.
adminSignin.accessDenied: Access denied. Only authorized administrators can sign in.
adminSignin.signInFailed: Sign in failed. Please try again.

privacyPolicy.metaDescription: How V2studio in Bratislava processes personal data under the GDPR and Slovak Act No. 18/2018 Z.z.
privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.intro: This Privacy Policy applies to the V2studio website and online booking at {address}, Slovak Republic. We process personal data in accordance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (General Data Protection Regulation, GDPR) and Act No. 18/2018 Coll. on Personal Data Protection of the Slovak Republic, as amended.
privacyPolicy.controller: The controller of your personal data is Natali Volik, operating as {addressSubtitle}, V2studio, {address}, Slovak Republic. For questions about this policy or your data, contact us at {email} or {phone}.
privacyPolicy.legal: Because we provide services in Bratislava, Slovak Republic (European Union), the GDPR and the Slovak Act apply. You have the right to lodge a complaint with the Office for Personal Data Protection of the Slovak Republic (ÚOOÚ SR), Hraničná 12, 820 07 Bratislava 27, Slovakia — https://dataprotection.gov.sk/
privacyPolicy.data: Depending on how you interact with us, we may process: identification and contact details you provide (name, phone, email, message content); booking details (date, time, selected service); and, where necessary for the website to function, limited technical data such as cookies (see the Cookie Policy link in the footer).
privacyPolicy.purposes: We use your data to: take and manage bookings and deliver our services (contract — Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR); communicate with you about appointments (contract or legitimate interests — Art. 6(1)(b) or (f)); comply with legal obligations such as accounting rules where applicable (Art. 6(1)(c)); keep the website secure and operational (legitimate interests — Art. 6(1)(f)); and, only if you give separate consent, send marketing messages (Art. 6(1)(a)).
privacyPolicy.retention: We keep personal data only as long as needed for these purposes — generally for the duration of our relationship and then for any period required by tax, accounting, or other Slovak or EU law, or until you withdraw consent for marketing, unless longer retention is justified by legitimate interests (for example defending legal claims).
privacyPolicy.rights: You may request access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, data portability, and object to processing based on legitimate interests. Where we rely on consent, you may withdraw it at any time without affecting the lawfulness of processing before withdrawal. To exercise your rights, contact {email}. You may also contact ÚOOÚ SR (see above).
privacyPolicy.cookies: We use cookies as described in our Cookie Policy. Optional cookies (analytics, marketing) are only activated with your consent via the banner or Cookie settings in the footer.
privacyPolicy.changes: We may update this Privacy Policy when our practices or the law change. The current version is always published on this page. Last updated: March 2026.

cookieConsent.title: We value your privacy
cookieConsent.description: We use essential cookies for the website to work and optional cookies for analytics and marketing. You can accept all, reject non-essential cookies, or choose categories. You can change your mind anytime.
cookieConsent.necessaryDesc: Needed for the site to function (security, core features, remembering your cookie choices). Always on.
cookieConsent.analyticsDesc: Helps us understand how the site is used (e.g. Google Analytics). Loaded only if you allow it.
cookieConsent.marketingDesc: May support campaign measurement or relevant content. Loaded only if you allow it.

cookiePolicy.metaDescription: How V2studio uses cookies and similar technologies in Slovakia and the EU.
cookiePolicy.title: Cookie Policy
cookiePolicy.intro: This Cookie Policy explains how V2studio ({address}, Slovak Republic) uses cookies and similar technologies on this website, in line with EU law (including the GDPR) and national rules on electronic communications (ePrivacy) as implemented in Slovakia.
cookiePolicy.whatBody: Cookies are small files stored on your device when you visit a website. They are often used to make the site work, remember settings, and—with your consent—to measure usage or personalise content.
cookiePolicy.categoriesBody: Strictly necessary cookies are required for core operation (for example storing your consent choice and secure parts of the site). Analytics cookies help us understand visits and improve the site; they load only if you accept them in the banner or enable them in custom settings. Marketing cookies are used only if you enable Marketing. We do not sell your personal data.
cookiePolicy.legalBody: The site is operated from Bratislava, Slovak Republic (EU). Where cookies involve personal data, the GDPR applies together with rules on cookies and similar technologies in electronic communications. See also our Privacy Policy for personal data processing.
cookiePolicy.usedTitle: What we use on this site
cookiePolicy.usedBody: We set a first-party cookie v2studio_cookie_consent (up to 12 months) to remember your choices. When you use the staff admin area, standard session cookies may be set for sign-in. If you consent to Analytics, we may load Google Analytics 4, which can set additional cookies or use similar storage.
cookiePolicy.manageBody: Use the cookie banner or “Cookie settings” in the footer to change optional cookies. You can also block or delete cookies in your browser; if you remove the consent cookie, the banner will appear again after a short delay.
cookiePolicy.updatesBody: We may update this Cookie Policy when our practices or the law change. Last updated: March 2026.
